title: philotheca falcata
intro: Philotheca falcata, also known as the lemon scented myrtle, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Philotheca falcata include relief from colds and flu due to its expectorant properties and its ability to soothe digestive issues. Philotheca falcata is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
